name: April Mcclain Delaney
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $259,182 for April Mcclain Delaney in U.S. House, MD-06. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
